hypothesis: Sprint 3 lever 2 (LoRA) — s3-d3 left -0.08 on gifts (the topic the base was strongest at) and -0.05 on keyword queries. Both look like residual catastrophic forgetting / distribution narrowing under full fine-tuning. LoRA preserves all 568M base params (frozen) and only trains low-rank attention adapters; predicted to keep gifts/lobbying/keyword closer to base while still letting trained-distribution gains accumulate. Standard starting config: rank=16, target Q/V, alpha=32, LR=1e-4 (5-10x higher than full-FT LR is the LoRA convention since adapters start at zero).
